items.title: Ford Otomotiv Sanayi A.Ş. Credit Rating
items.content:
Fitch Ratings has affirmed Ford Otomotiv's long-term credit rating at 'BB+' with a stable outlook.

International credit rating agency Fitch Ratings has released an updated report affirming the long-term credit rating of Ford Otomotiv Sanayi A.Ş. at 'BB+' with a stable outlook. Further details regarding the credit rating are available on the company's website. An English translation of the announcement is provided, with the Turkish version taking precedence in case of discrepancies.
